title: Creamy Irish Yautia Casserole
description: A sweet and creamy vegetarian dish featuring yautia, perfect for a cold winter's night, this casserole is both energizing and delicious.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot of boiling water, blanch the diced yautia for 5 minutes, then immediately submerge it in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until the onion is translucent.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked yautia, sauteed onion and garlic, heavy cream, grated cheddar cheese, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional grated cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the casserole cool for a few minutes before serving.
